basic_details.short_information: The Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) Centre for Cancer Epidemiology has officially announced the Field Supervisor Recruitment 2026 with 3 openings. The detailed notification has been published on the official website https://tmc.gov.in/. Candidates who meet the prescribed age criteria and hold a Graduate degree are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 08 July 2026 for this project-based position. Direct links to download the official notification and walk-in interview details are shared below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Field Supervisor: Graduate from a recognized University with a minimum of 2 years of experience as a Health Worker, Field Supervisor, or in Community/Public health-related field activities. Good Communication and interpersonal skills. Proficiency in MS Office applications and report preparation.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download TMC Field Supervisor Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download TMC Field Supervisor Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Field Supervisor post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Field Supervisor post at Tata Memorial Centre is scheduled for 08 July 2026. Candidates should report between 10:00 AM and 11:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Field Supervisor position?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates from a recognized University. Additionally, a minimum of 2 years of experience in a relevant field is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Field Supervisor role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Field Supervisor position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Field Supervisor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Field Supervisor post at Tata Memorial Centre.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Eligible candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Room No. 205, 2nd floor, Centre for Cancer Epidemiology, Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research & Education in Cancer, Sector 22, Kharghar, Navi Mumbai - 410 210.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry their Bio-data, Original certificates, Qualification Certificates, Experience Certificates, Birth Certificate, Photo, Pan Card, etc., along with a set of Xerox copies.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit for the Field Supervisor post?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details. The provided data does not specify the age limit.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Field Supervisor position at Tata Memorial Centre is Project-based.

faq.question: Q10. What are the desirable qualifications for the Field Supervisor role?
faq.answer: Desirable qualifications include experience in community-based health surveys, public health projects, data collection, or monitoring and supervision activities, as well as knowledge of local languages and familiarity with the Mumbai municipal health system.
